hero.headline: 5 years in software development and 2 years in cybersecurity, creating secure systems from the ground up.
hero.description: My cybersecurity expertise makes me a better developer, and my development experience makes me a more effective cybersecurity engineer.

about.heading: About Me
about.description: A unique blend of software development and cybersecurity skills, enabling me to build secure applications and identify vulnerabilities effectively.
about.paragraph: With 5 years in software development, I understand how systems are built, which enhances my cybersecurity approach. My 2 years in cybersecurity, particularly IAM and pentesting, allow me to write more secure code and identify threats proactively.
items: Secure coding practices informed by pentesting experience
about.cardText: Bridging development and security for holistic, resilient solutions.

skills.heading: Skills
skills.description: Technical expertise that spans development and security, enabling secure-by-design solutions.

items.title: Software Development
items.description: Full-stack development with secure coding practices, informed by cybersecurity knowledge.

items.title: Identity & Access Management
items.description: Azure AD, Okta, IAM governance, SSO, MFA, RBAC, least privilege, identity lifecycle.

items.title: Penetration Testing
items.description: Web application pentesting, network assessments, exploit validation, Burp Suite, Metasploit, OSINT.

items.title: Cloud Security
items.description: AWS, Azure, secure configuration, IAM roles, misconfiguration remediation, cloud threat modeling.

items.title: Security Operations
items.description: Vulnerability management, incident response support, security assessments, compliance reporting.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.description: A career blending software development with cybersecurity expertise for comprehensive solutions.

items.title: IAM Specialist
items.details: Designed and implemented identity governance controls, leveraging development skills to automate access reviews and reduce privilege exposure across multi-cloud environments.

items.title: Penetration Tester
items.details: Performed web app and network pentests, using development knowledge to understand code vulnerabilities and produce actionable reports for remediation.

items.title: Full-Stack Developer
items.details: Developed secure web applications and systems, applying best practices informed by emerging cybersecurity knowledge to build resilient software.

items.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
items.details: Delivered security assessments and supported access implementations, applying development experience to build secure systems in hybrid enterprise settings.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.description: Initiatives that demonstrate the integration of development and security skills.

items.title: Enterprise IAM Rollout
items.description: Developed and implemented centralized identity management with MFA, ensuring secure access while maintaining usability for 3,000+ users across SaaS applications.

items.title: Web Application Pentest
items.description: Conducted penetration testing on custom web applications, identifying vulnerabilities informed by deep development knowledge and validating secure fixes.

items.title: Cloud Security Review
items.description: Assessed and remediated cloud IAM policies, combining development insights with security expertise to reduce over-privileged access and improve compliance.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Ready to bring development and security expertise to your team for secure, innovative solutions.

footer.text: © 2026 Cybersecurity Portfolio. Built for IAM and pentesting professionals.
